title: 106. Om Sivers, space och AI-klubben
summary_md:
# 106. Om Sivers, space och AI-klubben

**Feed**: borssurr  
**Published**: 2026-06-05  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

In this episode of the Börssurr podcast, hosts Gabriel Mellqvist and Henrik Mittelman dissect the speculative frenzy around Sivers Semiconductors — a heavily shorted, unprofitable photonics/wireless firm that has burned short-sellers (e.g. hedge fund Colosseum) with a 70% single-day surge despite shrinking revenues and a dilutive rights issue. They draw repeated parallels between today's AI/space mania and the 1999 IT bubble, warning that an AI crash would drag down even solid Swedish names. Other themes include Hexagon's Octave spinoff arbitrage, private-equity liquidity stress at Partners Group/EQT, Intrum's massively dilutive 7.5bn rescue rights issue, mega capital raises (SpaceX, Anthropic, Google), and a sceptical take on stretched Stockholm housing valuations.

---

## Universe Stocks

### ⛔ SIVE — Sivers Semiconductors | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Unprofitable hype stock; real revenues down 20%, weak cash position pre-issue (26.6m), Q1 cashflow ~-50m; surge driven by short squeeze not fundamentals.

#### Reasoning

Hosts are explicitly sceptical: revenues are shrinking while only the 'hope pipeline' grows, the company has yet to deliver on promises, there are ~10 other listed photonics peers, and the move is a short squeeze rather than fundamental improvement. They wish it luck but would not buy at these levels.

#### Sell Triggers

- if real revenues keep declining
- if the company fails to convert pipeline into actual contracts
- if cash burn forces another dilutive issue
- if short squeeze unwinds

> *"Men jag är skeptisk. Jag tycker det är viktigt att vara tydlig. Det finns ju åtminstone tio andra börsnoterade Photonics-bolag... ett bolag som än så länge inte lyckats leverera på sina förhoppningar."*

---

### 🟢 INTRUM — Intrum | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Massive 7.5bn rescue rights issue at ~95% dilution backed by Nordic Capital; host has strong confidence in management.

#### Reasoning

After the heavily dilutive rights issue recapitalises the balance sheet, the host believes Intrum becomes buyable, citing high trust in the management and Nordic Capital stepping in to properly rescue the company.

#### Sell Triggers

- if rights issue fails or is undersubscribed
- if debt-collection cash flows deteriorate further
- if management changes

> *"Någonstans efter det här tror jag att man ska köpa Intrum. Jag har stort förtroende för ledningen."*

---

### 🟠 YUBICO — Yubico | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 55%

Hardware security-key maker, up nearly 50% in May; strong product riding cyber-security demand.

#### Reasoning

Hosts are impressed the once-beaten-down stock was among May's best performers and that the product is genuinely good amid rising cyber threats (AI finding system vulnerabilities). They question whether users will tolerate hardware tokens vs phone authenticators, hence watch rather than outright buy.

#### Sell Triggers

- if customers prefer software authenticators over hardware keys
- if growth stalls
- if valuation outruns adoption

> *"Kunde du inte tro att utbombade Ubico var en av de bästa aktierna i maj, upp nästan 50%? ... vad jag förstår så gör de bra grejer."*

---

### ⛔ PGHN — Partners Group | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 60%

Halted redemptions in a flagship fund for wealthy individuals; FT reports a second fund now seeing large redemption requests.

#### Reasoning

Hosts treat the gating as a warning bell that illiquid private-equity/private-credit products marketed to retail are based on fake valuations and fake liquidity; spreading redemption stress (now a second fund) signals broader trouble as mobile private clients try to exit.

#### Sell Triggers

- if redemption gates spread to more funds
- if NAV markdowns materialise on exits
- if private clients accelerate withdrawals

> *"Så är det lite av en varningsklocka tycker jag... idag rapporterar Financial Times att en andra fond från samma partners group nu ser stora uttags begäran."*

---

### 🟠 GOOGL — Google (Alphabet) | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Raising a huge $80bn via share issue despite strong cash flow and cheap credit access.

#### Reasoning

Hosts note a cash-rich firm that borrows cheaply has no funding pressure, so issuing $80bn of equity is easily read as management believing the stock is enormously expensive — a cautionary read echoing the 1999 bubble parallels they draw throughout.

#### Sell Triggers

- if AI capex fails to generate returns
- if AI leaders stop reacting positively to good earnings
- if credit spreads widen

> *"det är lätt att tolka det som att de helt enkelt tycker att aktien är enormt dyr och det här är ett bra sätt att ta in väldigt billiga pengar på."*

---

### 🟠 ATRLJ-B — Atrium Ljungberg | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Central to Slussen renewal and Hagastaden; possible repeat winner, but Varma just sold 40.6m shares at a 7% discount.

#### Reasoning

Hosts speculate Atrium may have 'done it again' as a redevelopment winner in the revitalised Slussen/southern Gamla stan area, but flag the Finnish pension fund Varma's discounted block sale as a mixed signal; real-estate stocks rarely move, possibly turning just when given up on.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Slussen/Hagastaden re-rating fails to materialise
- if more institutions exit at discounts
- if rates keep rising

> *"Börsspaningen på det här är att Atrium Lillejungberg kanske har gjort det igen."*

---

### 🟠 HAG — Hensoldt | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 30%

German defence-electronics maker in an AI-generated retail/short-squeeze basket; heavily shorted.

#### Reasoning

Presented half-ironically as part of an AI-picked portfolio of retail-driven European names where short squeezes are the thesis; momentum/speculative only, not a fundamental call.

#### Sell Triggers

- if short squeeze unwinds
- if retail interest fades
- if defence momentum reverses

> *"Hensolt i Tyskland, en elektronikutvecklare inom försvarsindustrin där det blankas mycket."*

---

### 🟠 R3NK — Renk Group | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 30%

German military-vehicle maker with large retail interest in the short-squeeze basket.

#### Reasoning

Listed in the AI-generated short-squeeze portfolio purely on retail interest and squeeze potential; speculative momentum, no fundamental conviction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if short squeeze unwinds
- if retail interest fades

> *"Ränk Group, inte kopplat till Johan Ränk... utan en tillverkare av militärfordon som också har sett stort retail-intresse."*

---

### 🟠 ETL — Eutelsat | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 30%

French satellite operator already up 300%, in the AI-generated short-squeeze/space basket.

#### Reasoning

Cited for a 300% run as part of the speculative short-squeeze and space-hype theme; momentum-driven, hosts treat the whole basket ironically.

#### Sell Triggers

- if momentum/short squeeze reverses
- if space hype cools

> *"Eutels Satt i Frankrike. Satellitoperatör som är upp 300%."*

---
